title: Police presence will increase at Syracuse pools after fatal shooting in Strathmore
summary: A 15-year-old was fatally shot outside Upper Onondaga Park Pool on June 25, 2025, prompting Mayor Walsh to announce increased police presence at city pools. The suspect remains at large and the weapon unfound. Pool reopening timeline is undetermined, and Parks & Recreation staff are receiving support services.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: Mayor publicly commits to increased police deployment at parks infrastructure in response to fatal incident, signaling public safety prioritization during summer recreation season.

processing_notes: Victim age (15) and fatality nature elevates this beyond routine crime incident to strategic public safety concern
